Implement infinite scroll loading more items near bottom
Exact equality rarely fires; no loading state; no cleanup

function @N@({@items@,loadMore,loading,hasMore}){const s=useRef(null);useEffect(()=>{if(!s.current||!hasMore||loading)return;const o=new IntersectionObserver(([e])=>{if(e.isIntersecting)loadMore()},{rootMargin:"200px"});o.observe(s.current);return()=>o.disconnect()},[hasMore,loading]);return
{@items@.map(@item@=>
{@item@.text}
)}{hasMore&&
{loading?"Loading...":"Scroll for more"}
}{!hasMore&&

}
}
Fires every scroll; no threshold; no dedup; no loading

{@items@.map((@item@,@i@)=>
{@item@}
)}{hasMore&&
{loading?"Loading...":null}
}{!hasMore&&
